name: rldyour-explore
description: Research skills for Codex: technical MCP research and authoritative web research with Russian user-facing output.

interface.shortDescription: MCP and web research for higher-quality implementation
interface.longDescription: This plugin adds two research skills for Codex. tech-research is used before complex technical implementation: it closes feature scope through Context7 for official documentation, DeepWiki for open-source repository architecture, and Grep by Vercel for real GitHub usage patterns. web-research is used for internet research: it first defines questions and constraints, then finds authoritative sources, reads them, and synthesizes conclusions with links. The plugin does not store secrets and does not configure MCP transports directly; it depends on MCP servers provided by rldyour-mcps. User-facing answers remain Russian unless the owner asks otherwise, while repository documentation is written in English.
defaultPrompt: Research the technical scope of this feature.
